layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing for layout structure mixed with dense, highly legible technical data blocks. Dark mode with glowing borders to emulate high-speed verification tools.
layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12
layout_and_spacing.masonry_grid: columns-1 sm:columns-2 lg:columns-3 xl:columns-4 gap-6 space-y-6

components.header: Sticky glassmorphism header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05030A]/80 border-b border-white/5. Must contain the FAST logo with font-black, tracking-tighter, and a blue-to-purple gradient text clip.
components.upload_zone: Large drag-and-drop zone. border-2 border-dashed border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/5 hover:bg-blue-500/10 hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-colors rounded-2xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center. Use lucide-react 'UploadCloud'.
components.textarea_paste: Terminal-style code editor look. bg-[#0A0710] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 font-mono text-sm text-blue-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 outline-none resize-none h-48 w-full
components.action_button: Generous padding (px-8 py-4), bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-purple-600 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
components.masonry_card: break-inside-avoid bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] rounded-2xl p-5 backdrop-blur-sm hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] relative overflow-hidden
components.platform_status_row: Flex row, items center, justify-between. py-2.5 border-b border-white/5 last:border-0. Text size text-sm font-mono. Use React Icons.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with a subtle electric glow via drop-shadow.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Pulse animation on the platform rows currently being verified. Consider a subtle linear-gradient tracing beam over the active masonry card.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up and slight slide-up for masonry items using framer-motion.

media.hero_background_instructions: Use as a fixed background wrapper for the entire app, opacity 5% to 15% max, with a heavy mix-blend-mode (like overlay or screen) and a radial gradient mask to fade it out at the edges (to pure #05030A). The data must remain 100% readable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: yarn add framer-motion react-icons lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
Ensure 'Unbounded' (headings) and 'JetBrains Mono' (body/data) fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.html.
App must be accessible without login. No authentication or history flows.
Build a dual-input hero section: one side for File Upload (CSV/TXT), the other for raw Text Paste.

The core results view MUST be a Masonry layout (use CSS: columns-1 sm:columns-2 lg:columns-3 xl:columns-4 gap-6 space-y-6). Each 'brick' is an email/phone item, showing the 5 platforms inside with their real-time verification status (Found, Not Found, Pending).
Mock the mass verification logic with a setTimeout/interval so the masonry grid fills up dynamically, giving a 'real-time streaming' effect.
Use react-icons/si for platform logos (SiUbereats, SiAmazon, SiNetflix, SiBinance, SiCoinbase).
Include an 'Export Results' button (mocking CSV download).
ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, masonry cards, toggles) MUST have appropriate 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='verify-submit-btn').
